节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Request to publish a form to the form host. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified;2.Incorrect parameter types; 3.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { Want } want - The want of the form to publish.
@param { AsyncCallback<string> } callback - The callback is used to return the form id.
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - The application is not a system application.
@throws { BusinessError } 16500100 - Failed to obtain the configuration information.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501000 - An internal functional error occurred.
@throws { BusinessError } 16501008 - Waiting for the form addition to the desktop timed out.

parameters.说明: The want of the form to publish.
The callback is used to return the form id.

error_codes.description: The application is not a system application.
Failed to obtain the configuration information.
Waiting for the form addition to the desktop timed out.
